inputs.label: Failure Rate (λ)
inputs.businessContext: Base failure rate of the component or system

businessContext_i18n.en: Base failure rate of the component or system
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bileşenin veya sistemin temel arıza oranı
businessContext_i18n.de: Basisausfallrate der Komponente oder des Systems
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de défaillance de base du composant ou du système
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de fallo base del componente o sistema
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل الفشل الأساسي للمكون أو النظام

businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée de fonctionnement ou de mission
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración de la operación o misión

inputs.label: Environmental Stress Factor
inputs.businessContext: Factor increasing failure rate due to harsh conditions

businessContext_i18n.en: Factor increasing failure rate due to harsh conditions
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zorlu koşullar nedeniyle arıza oranını artıran faktör
businessContext_i18n.de: Faktor, der die Ausfallrate aufgrund rauer Bedingungen erhöht
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur augmentant le taux de défaillance dû à des conditions difficiles
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor que aumenta la tasa de fallo debido a condiciones adversas
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل يزيد معدل الفشل بسبب الظروف القاسية

inputs.label: Maintenance Quality Factor
inputs.businessContext: Factor representing maintenance effectiveness; higher reduces failure rate

businessContext_i18n.en: Factor representing maintenance effectiveness; higher reduces failure rate
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bakım etkinliğini temsil eden faktör; yüksek değer arıza oranını azaltır
businessContext_i18n.de: Faktor, der die Wartungseffektivität darstellt; höher reduziert die Ausfallrate
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur représentant l'efficacité de la maintenance ; plus élevé réduit le taux de défaillance
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor que representa la efectividad del mantenimiento; un valor más alto reduce la tasa de fallo
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل يمثل فعالية الصيانة؛ القيمة الأعلى تقلل معدل الفشل

inputs.label: Fault Detection Probability
inputs.businessContext: Probability that a fault is detected before it leads to failure

businessContext_i18n.en: Probability that a fault is detected before it leads to failure
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir arızanın hataya yol açmadan önce tespit edilme olasılığı
businessContext_i18n.de: Wahrscheinlichkeit, dass ein Fehler erkannt wird, bevor er zu einem Ausfall führt
businessContext_i18n.fr: Probabilité qu'un défaut soit détecté avant qu'il n'entraîne une défaillance
businessContext_i18n.es: Probabilidad de que un fallo sea detectado antes de que provoque una avería
businessContext_i18n.ar: احتمالية اكتشاف العطل قبل أن يؤدي إلى فشل

inputs.label: Redundancy Level
inputs.businessContext: Number of independent redundant components in parallel (1 means no redundancy)

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of independent redundant components in parallel (1 means no redundancy)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Paralel bağlı bağımsız yedekli bileşen sayısı (1, yedeklilik olmadığı anlamına gelir)
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der unabhängigen redundanten Komponenten parallel (1 bedeutet keine Redundanz)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de composants redondants indépendants en parallèle (1 signifie aucune redondance)
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de componentes redundantes independientes en paralelo (1 significa sin redundancia)
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد المكونات المستقلة المكررة على التوازي (1 يعني عدم وجود تكرار)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
